nvidiarobotics.text:
Industry leaders are turning to AI and edge computing to make faster, smarter decisions.

Join @honeywell, @KIONGroup, @CaterpillarInc, @Medtronic and @HitachiRailENG at #NVIDIAGTC to explore how edge intelligence drives meaningful change.

Add to schedule 🔗 https://nvda.ws/3MMAy2t
📅Wed, March 18 | 9:00 a.m PT

What’s next in robotics starts with physical AI. 🤖 

By combining decades of machine data with AI, simulation, and digital twins, leaders like @AGIBOTofficial, @FRANKAROBOTICS, @CaterpillarInc, and @PlusAI_Inc are scaling intelligent machines across industries and redefining what robots can do in the physical world.

Watch the full video 📹 https://nvda.ws/40jncOc

asimovinc.text: Day 150 of building Asimov, an open-source humanoid. We're assembling Asimov v1. The torso is going on the legs now.
Everything you need to build Asimov, an open-source humanoid robot. Manual and assembly video coming soon.
